section_name: Duties of Texas Department of Licensing and Regulation, Health and Human Services Commission, and Texas Department of Criminal Justice; Application and Renewal Fees
text:
(a) Repealed by Acts 2023, 88th Leg., R.S., Ch. 627 (H.B. 4417), Sec. 3(2), eff. June 11, 2023.

(b) The Health and Human Services Commission:

(1) shall monitor a chemical dependency treatment facility’s compliance with providing the approved educational program as described by Section 521.374 (Educational Program or Equivalent Education) (a)(2) providing equivalent education; and

(2) shall administer the approval of the equivalent education provided in a chemical dependency treatment facility described by Section 521.374 (Educational Program or Equivalent Education) (a)(2)(C).

(c) The Texas Department of Criminal Justice:

(1) shall monitor the compliance of a facility described by Section 521.374 (Educational Program or Equivalent Education) (a)(2)(A) or (B) with providing the approved educational program as described by Section 521.374 (Educational Program or Equivalent Education) (a)(2) providing equivalent education; and

(2) shall administer the approval of the equivalent educational program provided in a facility described by Section 521.374 (Educational Program or Equivalent Education) (a)(2)(A) or (B).

Reenacted and amended by Acts 2021, 87th Leg., R.S., Ch. 543 (S.B. 181 ), Sec. 2.04, eff. September 1, 2021.

Reenacted and amended by Acts 2021, 87th Leg., R.S., Ch. 948 (S.B. 1480 ), Sec. 18, eff. September 1, 2021.
markdown:
# Transp. Code
## Title 7
### Chapter 521. Driver's Licenses & Certificates
##### § 521.376 — Duties of Texas Department of Licensing and Regulation, Health and Human Services Commission, and Texas Department of Criminal Justice; Application and Renewal Fees

(a) Repealed by Acts 2023, 88th Leg., R.S., Ch. 627 (H.B. 4417), Sec. 3(2), eff. June 11, 2023.

(b) The Health and Human Services Commission:

    (1) shall monitor a chemical dependency treatment facility’s compliance with providing the approved educational program as described by Section 521.374 (Educational Program or Equivalent Education) (a)(2) providing equivalent education; and

    (2) shall administer the approval of the equivalent education provided in a chemical dependency treatment facility described by Section 521.374 (Educational Program or Equivalent Education) (a)(2)(C).

(c) The Texas Department of Criminal Justice:

    (1) shall monitor the compliance of a facility described by Section 521.374 (Educational Program or Equivalent Education) (a)(2)(A) or (B) with providing the approved educational program as described by Section 521.374 (Educational Program or Equivalent Education) (a)(2) providing equivalent education; and

    (2) shall administer the approval of the equivalent educational program provided in a facility described by Section 521.374 (Educational Program or Equivalent Education) (a)(2)(A) or (B).

Reenacted and amended by Acts 2021, 87th Leg., R.S., Ch. 543 (S.B. 181 ), Sec. 2.04, eff. September 1, 2021.

Reenacted and amended by Acts 2021, 87th Leg., R.S., Ch. 948 (S.B. 1480 ), Sec. 18, eff. September 1, 2021.

*Acts 2023, 88th Leg., R.S., Ch. 1021 (H.B.5183), Sec. 10, eff. June 18, 2023.*

shall administer the approval of the equivalent educational program provided in a facility described by Section 521.374 (Educational Program or Equivalent Education) (a)(2)(A) or (B).
Reenacted and amended by Acts 2021, 87th Leg., R.S., Ch. 543 (S.B. 181 ), Sec. 2.04, eff. September 1, 2021.
Reenacted and amended by Acts 2021, 87th Leg., R.S., Ch. 948 (S.B. 1480 ), Sec. 18, eff. September 1, 2021.
